Author: Deleted User
Content:
/punish - use this for pretty much everything (griefers, nsfw, etc)

/warn - only use this if its for something thats not on /punish, for example annoyance warns

/mute - same thing, only use if for something not on /punish, like advertising

/staffchat - opens staff chat

/vanish - puts you in vanish

/announce and /mapreset 50xCreative - use this to do a map reset **vote** and if majority vote yes then do mapreset

/findlagmachine - has a menu you can go through people if theres a lag machine

/clearchat - use if someone was flooding chat, racism, etc after muting them

/co rollback (user) time:(do 1d or 1h) radius:#50xCreative or 50 - rolls back grief if you manually banned or something

/co i - you can inspect blocks to see who griefed

> **INGAME RULES:**


No griefing, modifying or defaming builds.
No advertising or promoting goods or services.
No inappropriate names, skins, builds or behaviour.
No begging or solicitng for any items or ranks.
No repeated standalone flag builds of more than 5 times.
No builds or machines that causes lag or TPS drops.
No abusing exploits / crashing the server.
No sharing of custom items to players that are not in /nbts
No constant arguing or fighting in the server.
No acts of threats or bullying in the server.
No revelation of personal information of anyone here.
No forms of communism or politics allowed.
No custom items or NBTs from saved menus. (Allowed if you have NBT permissions, and does not have a lag component.)
No forms of annoyance of anything (e.g. chat flood & etc).
No claiming land in the creative wordld, build considerately. (allow malls - maximum land claim is 12x12 - should be sellable ALWAYS.)
No building non country flags (to prevent conflict).
Flying while being AFK in Plot world is not allowed. Flying more than 5000ish blocks. (Will be counted as Lag machine ban.)

> **AND REMEMBER**
> Admins are able to modify the rules, punish players at any given time without any prior notice(s) however they deem the actions to be inappropriate.

Author: sggopen
Content:
Preamble- Okay, let me just list some things here in all due respect

Grievances 
1. Although it may of been me the past few times building borders to divide 50X into two different providences. It is not just me doing it.

2. Although the border might seem big it’s only 3 blocks wide and reaches world border to world border, which gives plenty of more space for people to build.

3. Although there may be more people complaining about it, there is only one person that gets very paranoid about the issue. The player in question is taking it as if it was targeted towards his racial demographic, which the border is not supposed to be targeted towards any particular race or be related to any real world events, maps, nor current political borders. 

My Statement

In all fairness I will still be building in partaking in border activities, as often as I did in the past few days? No. In all due respect I don’t have time to enforce that one thing just for one person to be happy, as most of our player base really likes the border concept and does not take it as seriously as that smaller player base does. Thanks for your time

~SG

Author: Deleted User
Content:
Hello @JR. MODs!

Here is a list of the important commands for you to use while staffing!

**/punish**
Use this command for serious offenses like griefing, NSFW content, slurs, exploiting, etc. It covers most major rule violations.
**
/warn**
Use only for minor issues that don’t warrant a full punishment, such as being annoying or breaking small rules repeatedly.

**/mute**
Use for less severe cases not covered by /punish, like advertising, chat flooding, or repeated off-topic spam. Always mute before clearing chat if needed.

**/staffchat**
Opens the private staff chat. Use it to coordinate with other staff without players seeing.

**/vanish**
Puts you into vanish mode so players can't see you. Use when investigating or watching players silently.

**/announce**
Use this to broadcast a message to the whole server.

/**mapreset** 50xCreative
Starts a vote to reset the 50x50 creative map. Only reset if the majority votes yes.

/**clearchat**
Clears the chat for all players. Use after muting someone who spammed, was racist, or flooded the chat.

/**co rollback (user) time:1d radius:#50xCreativ**e
Rolls back block changes by a player. Use after punishing a griefer. Adjust time: and radius: as needed (e.g., 1h, 50 blocks).

Thank you for applying, and have a great time staffing!

Author: sleppyorange
Content:
Welcome to the team, @JR. MOD 

We’re really happy to have you with us! As a Jr Mod, you play an important role in keeping the server safe, fair, and fun for everyone. Here's a quick guide to help you get started:




# Important Commands to Know:

`/punish <player>`
Opens a menu where you can choose the type of offense (e.g., grief, NSFW, etc.).
If a category is missing or doesn’t fit the situation, use:

`/tempban <player> <time> <reason>`

`/warn <player> CustomWarning <reason>`

`/co i` or `/co near`
Use these CoreProtect commands to check who broke or placed blocks near you. Always try to gather proof before taking action.

`/co rollback user:<name> action:<action> time:<time> radius:<radius>`
Roll back block changes made by a player.

`/votereset start auto-reset`
Starts a vote to reset the map.




# Staff Guidelines:

**Always try to collect proof** using `/co i` or `/co near` before punishing someone.

**Always give a clear reason when punishing or removing punishments** (e.g., unwarn/unban). It helps other staff understand what happened.

**Don’t hesitate to ask for help** if you're unsure, you're not alone!

Thanks again for joining the team, and we hope you have a great time being staff on 50x!

Author: mikazeka2
Content:
Short “What We Do” Line Under the Title
One clear sentence that explains EverxStudio in plain language, while keeping the futuristic tone.

Single Strong Call-to-Action Button
Replace or complement “APPLY_50X” with one obvious action like Start a Project or Request Access.

Minimal Services List (3 items max)
A small row of three keywords (e.g., Design · Development · Strategy) so visitors instantly understand your offering.

Subtle Motion to the Progress Bar
A gentle looping animation or pulse so the page feels alive, even when “100%” is reached.

Footer Trust Line
One short credibility line such as “Building digital experiences for forward-thinking brands” or “Trusted by teams worldwide.”

If you want, I can also suggest copy that matches your exact visual style or help simplify what you already have.
